task: Advanced high-value task: Iam Attack Path Graph Sensitivity Envelope Study. Scenario: a high-value system is approaching an engineering gate and the owner needs a defensible go/no-go packet for iam attack path graph. Embedded packet: Records: R1 admin_edges=19 public_triggers=36 PII_reachable=4; R2 admin_edges=28 public_triggers=32 PII_reachable=7; R3 admin_edges=14 public_triggers=47 PII_reachable=3. Remediation options: O1 changes admin_edges by -12% cost=66500; O2 changes public_triggers by -18% cost=87300; O3 changes PII_reachable by -25% cost=48700; max_budget=111600. Rules and constraints: public trigger reaching PII or admin edge without MFA is critical; missing values cannot be imputed and all calculations must use only the embedded packet. Required work: write a specialist-facing memo that distinguishes calculation results, assumptions, missing inputs, and expert-review questions. Deliver IAM_attack_path_1.xlsx + expert_memo.md with formulas, intermediate values, row-level citations, explicit assumptions, sensitivity checks, and a final recommendation table. Do not invent inputs; mark ambiguous items as needs_review.
